description: Spot BTC/ETH ETF premium-discount vs NAV. 15 ETFs (IBIT FBTC ARKB BITB HODL BRRR EZBC GBTC + ETHA FETH ETHE ETH ETHV ETHW QETH). Arb tickets for premiums/discounts >0.4%. Telegram alert >0.8%. Every 30 min during US market hours.
